location: Chance drop from Oracle Envoy enemies patrolling the rampart west of the East Capital Rampart grace in Leyndell, Royal Capital. A second farmable group of three Envoys also appears east of the Haligtree Canopy grace in Miquella's Haligtree.
tactics: Low drop rate (about 2% at 100 Discovery) — plan to fight the same Envoys repeatedly or boost item discovery first.
Oracle Envoys hit hard with holy-infused strikes for a first Capital visit; engage them one at a time along the rampart rather than in a group.
A much tougher Giant Oracle Envoy also patrols nearby, guarding a corpse with a Golden Rune — that fight is optional and separate from farming the Horn.
lore: The heavy golden horn carried by Oracle Envoys — technically an instrument, but its weight is so great that no ordinary person could ever actually play it, so it ends up being swung like a club instead.

builds.name: Faith Hybrid Bruiser
builds.why: D-scaling in Strength, Dexterity and Faith plus innate holy damage let a Faith character keep pace in melee while retaining the ranged Oracular Bubble option.
